CREATE TABLE times_table (id INT, event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO times_table VALUES (1, TIME '14:21:13'), (2, TIME '23:59:59'), (3, TIME '00:00:00'), (4, TIME '06:30:15');
SELECT extract('hour' FROM event_time) FROM times_table;
SELECT extract('minute' FROM event_time) FROM times_table WHERE id = 2;
SELECT extract('second' FROM event_time) FROM times_table WHERE event_time > TIME '08:00:00';
SELECT id, extract('hour' FROM event_time) AS hour, extract('minute' FROM event_time) AS minute FROM times_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM times_table WHERE event_time < TIME '12:00:00');
CREATE TABLE events (event_id INT, event_time TIME);
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, TIME '12:00:00'), (2, TIME '15:45:30'), (3, TIME '18:30:45');
SELECT t.id, t.event_time, (SELECT extract('second' FROM t.event_time) + extract('minute' FROM t.event_time) * 60 FROM times_table t2 WHERE t2.id = t.id) AS total_seconds FROM times_table t;

SELECT e.event_id, extract('hour' FROM e.event_time) + extract('minute' FROM e.event_time) / 60.0 AS decimal_hour FROM events e JOIN times_table t ON extract('hour' FROM e.event_time) = extract('hour' FROM t.event_time);

SELECT t.id, extract('hour' FROM t.event_time) AS hour, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM events e WHERE extract('hour' FROM e.event_time) = extract('hour' FROM t.event_time)) AS hour_count FROM times_table t WHERE extract('hour' FROM t.event_time) < 12;
